ch0108_00_nobori_salon/8201_2003_01_10:
Let us enjoy an excellent time together
aboard this two-car train!
ch0108_00_nobori_salon/8201_2101_02_10:
Knowing you, I’m sure you’ll put it to
good use!
ch0108_00_nobori_salon/8201_2102_01_10:
I’d like to give you this,
[Name:PlayerNickname ]!
ch0108_00_nobori_salon/8201_2102_02_10: I hope it will help you reach greater heights!
ch0108_00_nobori_salon/8201_2103_01_10:
Oh, [Name:PlayerNickname ]! Allow me
to present you with this gift as a token of my
gratitude!
ch0108_00_nobori_salon/8201_2103_02_10:
When you spend time with someone,
your engine powers something special!
ch0108_00_nobori_salon/8201_2103_03_10:
Our time together can drive us to aim for
even greater heights!
ch0108_00_nobori_salon/8201_2201_01_10: Yes? What would you like to discuss?
ch0108_00_nobori_salon/8201_2202_01_10:
I was looking forward to speaking with you,
[Name:PlayerNickname ]!
ch0108_00_nobori_salon/8201_2203_01_10:
I see it’s time for a chat! All right,
[Name:PlayerNickname ]—all aboard!
ch0108_00_nobori_salon/8201_2302_01_10: A present for me?! Thank you very much!
ch0108_00_nobori_salon/8201_2301_01_10:
What a wonderful gift! My heart is filled
with joy!
ch0108_00_nobori_salon/8201_2301_02_10:
Bravo! Excellent! No other words could
express my gratitude!
ch0108_00_nobori_salon/8201_2402_01_10:
It seems we’re approaching our last stop.
Farewell!
ch0108_00_nobori_salon/8201_2401_01_10: Bravo! I had a fantastic time!
ch0108_00_nobori_salon/8201_2401_02_10:
Please spend time with me again soon!
I look forward to seeing you!
ch0108_00_nobori_salon/8001_0701_01_10:
The more we spend time together and get to
know each other, the stronger our bond will
become!
ch0108_00_nobori_salon/8001_0701_02_10:
A strong bond is the most powerful weapon
in a tag battle!
ch0108_00_nobori_salon/8001_0701_03_10:
You could say it’s an express ticket to
greater heights. We’re lucky we were
invited to the Trainer Lodge!
ch0108_00_nobori_salon/8002_0701_01_10:
Tag battles can make you wonder what a
good combination truly is.
ch0108_00_nobori_salon/8002_0701_02_10:
For instance, two quarreling Trainers could
work well together once battle starts.
ch0108_00_nobori_salon/8002_0701_03_10:
Some bonds aren’t visible to the naked eye.
You can’t measure every bond by how it
looks on the surface!
ch0108_00_nobori_salon/8003_0701_01_10:
Us twins are so similar, it can be like looking
in a mirror.
ch0108_00_nobori_salon/8003_0701_02_10:
Perhaps we do so much together because
we look and think so alike.
ch0108_00_nobori_salon/8003_0701_03_10:
Realizing we don’t always need to be
together was a big step forward for me!
